seoTitle: Onslow vs Ora Banda — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Onslow and Ora Banda. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Onslow vs Ora Banda: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Onslow and Ora Banda.
heading: Onslow vs Ora Banda — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Onslow, Western Australia and Ora Banda, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Onslow has a lower overall climate risk score (23/100) compared to Ora Banda (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Onslow or Ora Banda safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Onslow has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Ora Banda scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Onslow scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Ora Banda scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Onslow or Ora Banda?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Onslow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
